text:
postgres MCP: 1 tool, 33 tokens, A+ score.

grafana MCP: 68 tools, 11,632 tokens, F score.

they serve different purposes. but the design philosophy gap is 352x.

the database that powers half the internet shipped an MCP server with one tool.

one tool. perfect score.

the teams that ship 80 tools could learn something from that.

postgres got MCP right by doing almost nothing.

minimal surface area. clear purpose. no description bloat.

98% of 198 servers score below it. full breakdown:
